narrative:
55 Ohio House district has 91,731 registered voters, with 53.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.0 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -8.4% D−R vs -37.4% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
